summary: Good audience recording with clear mids and highs, though the bass response is a bit thin
review: The audience (Aud) source captures the marathon concert with respectable clarity; mids and highs are notably crisp while the low end lacks some depth compared to other sources. Reviewers rate it positively overall, making it a solid go‑to tape for listeners who prioritize detail over bass heft.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review available; the reviewer gave 4 stars and praised clarity, but provided no musical performance details, so rating is based mainly on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear mids and highs, respectable overall sound; bass response not as deep as the Brotman Schps source but still usable.
